interventions.action: Automate top 3 manual handoffs blocking delivery pipeline
Map and eliminate top 5 manual dependencies in the critical path
Build self-service platform patterns for common execution tasks
Containerize legacy workloads to reduce infrastructure dependency
Build policy-as-code guardrails to replace manual approval gates

summary: Boeing is a HIGH risk system with an adaptation latency score of 4.1/5.0. Primary bottleneck: Execution Latency — driven by Manual dependency / legacy systems. Immediate systemic intervention required to reduce adaptation latency.
